title: DXF RC 7.4V LIPO BATTERY 2Pack - 8400mAh 2S LIPO Battery for 1/8 & 1/10 Cars - lipo battery High Discharge 100C, Deans/T Plug, Fits Losi, HPI, Axial & More
features: Experience unparalleled performance with our 7.4V LIPO BATTERY, designed for RC enthusiasts. This 2S LIPO BATTERY ensures your RC vehicles run at peak efficiency.
Power your RC adventures with a reliable 7.4V BATTERY. Its 8400mAh capacity guarantees extended playtime, perfect for long RC sessions.
Our LIPO BATTERY features a 100C discharge rate, providing rapid energy delivery for high-speed RC action. Ideal for demanding RC applications.
Compact and lightweight, this 7.4V LIPO BATTERY is easy to handle and fits various RC models. Enjoy precise control and unmatched maneuverability.
Enhance your RC experience with our premium LIPO BATTERY. Compatible with popular RC brands, it's a must-have for any serious RC enthusiast.
description: Upgrade your RC experience with our high-performance 7.4V LIPO BATTERY. This 2S LIPO BATTERY pack includes 2pcs of 8400mAh batteries, each with a 7.4V output, ensuring long-lasting power for your RC vehicles. Designed for optimal performance, these LIPO BATTERIES feature a discharge rate of 100C, making them ideal for high-demand applications. The compact dimensions of 138 x 47 x 25 mm (L x W x H) and a weight of approximately 340g make them perfect for a variety of RC models, including 1/8 and 1/10 cars, Losi, HPI Strada XB 1/10 RTR Buggy, Team Associated, Axial, Tamiya, Duratrax, ElectrixRC, Bandit, Rustler version, etc. The Deans/T plug ensures easy and secure connectivity, while the 7.4V LIPO BATTERY's compatibility with 2S1P configurations guarantees seamless integration into your RC setup. Whether you're a professional racer or a hobbyist, this 7.4V BATTERY pack provides the power and reliability you need for an enhanced RC experience. Choose our LIPO BATTERY for unmatched performance and durability in your RC BATTERY needs.

specifications_table.Model Name: Upgrade your RC experience with our high-performance 3S LIPO BATTERY. This 11.4V BATTERY is designed to deliver exceptional power and reliability for your RC models. With a capacity of 8000mAh and a discharge rate of 130C, this LIPO BATTERY ensures maximum performance and extended runtime. The XT90 plug makes it easy to connect and disconnect, while the compact size of 138 x 47 x 36 mm (L x W x H) and weight of approximately 435g make it suitable for a variety of RC vehicles, including 1/8 and 1/10 cars, Losi, HPI Strada XB 1/10 RTR Buggy, Team Associated, Axial, Tamiya, Duratrax, ElectrixRC, Bandit, Rustler version, and more. Please ensure the voltage, dimensions, and plug match for compatibility. Enhance your RC adventures with the power of our 11.4V LIPO BATTERY. This 2Pack offers great value, providing you with two batteries for extended playtime and convenience. Whether you're racing or exploring, our RC BATTERY will keep you going strong. Experience the difference with our premium LIPO technology, designed for RC enthusiasts who demand the best.
